inputs.label: Number of Meals per Week
inputs.businessContext: Total number of meals that are being switched from meat-based to vegan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of meals that are being switched from meat-based to vegan.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Et bazlıdan vegana geçirilen toplam öğün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Mahlzeiten, die von fleischbasiert auf vegan umgestellt werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de repas passant d'un régime carné à un régime végétalien.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de comidas que se cambian de carne a veganas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الوجبات التي يتم تحويلها من اللحوم إلى النباتية.

inputs.label: Average CO2 per Meat Meal
inputs.businessContext: Average carbon footprint of a meat-based meal.

label_i18n.es: CO2 promedio por comida de carne
label_i18n.ar: متوسط ثاني أكسيد الكربون لكل وجبة لحوم

businessContext_i18n.en: Average carbon footprint of a meat-based meal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Et bazlı bir öğünün ortalama karbon ayak izi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Empreinte carbone moyenne d'un repas carné.
businessContext_i18n.es: Huella de carbono promedio de una comida a base de carne.

inputs.businessContext: Average carbon footprint of a vegan meal.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average carbon footprint of a vegan meal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vegan bir öğünün ortalama karbon ayak izi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Empreinte carbone moyenne d'un repas végétalien.
businessContext_i18n.es: Huella de carbono promedio de una comida vegana.

inputs.label: Cost per Meat Meal
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of a meat-based meal.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost of a meat-based meal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Et bazlı bir öğünün ortalama maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste promedio de una comida a base de carne.

inputs.label: Cost per Vegan Meal
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of a vegan meal.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost of a vegan meal.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste promedio de una comida vegana.

inputs.label: Number of Weeks
inputs.businessContext: Period in weeks for the calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Period in weeks for the calculation.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeitraum in Wochen für die Berechnung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Période en semaines pour le calcul.
businessContext_i18n.es: Período en semanas para el cálculo.

formulas.primary: 'Total CO2 Savings: ' + co2Savings + ' kg CO2, Total Cost Savings: $' + costSavings
formulas.breakdown1: 'Meat-based total CO2: ' + (numMeals * weeks * co2MeatPerMeal) + ' kg CO2, Cost: $' + (numMeals * weeks * costMeatPerMeal)
formulas.breakdown2: 'Vegan total CO2: ' + (numMeals * weeks * co2VeganPerMeal) + ' kg CO2, Cost: $' + (numMeals * weeks * costVeganPerMeal)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
